---
title: "Welcome!"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![Portrait photographed by Dustin Angell](images/Bio_pic.JPG){width=250px}
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {style="text-align:center"}
<h3>My name is Jenna Baljunas, and I study community ecology!</h3>

Currently, I am a PhD student in the [Spatial and Community Ecology (SpaCE) Lab](https://www.communityecologylab.com/) at Michigan State University and a part of the [Department of Integrative Biology](https://integrativebiology.natsci.msu.edu/) and [Ecology, Evolution, and Behavior program](https://eeb.msu.edu/).

<div class="image-row">

  <a href="https://integrativebiology.natsci.msu.edu/" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/IBIO_logo.png" width="100">
  </a>

  <a href="https://eeb.msu.edu/" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/EEB_logo.jpg" width="100">
  </a>

</div>
:::
:::
::::

::: {style="text-align:center"}
<h2>I am interested in how species interact with each other and the environment around them.</h2>
:::

<div style="
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 400px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(to left,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.95) 0%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.75) 30%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 60%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%),
    url('images/snake2.jpeg');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 50px;
">

<div style="
  max-width: 40%;
  color: white;
  text-align: left;
">

My research explores the drivers of community change across spatial and temporal scales. I enjoy working with multiple taxonomic groups and
